message:
Document Bun threading package addition

NOTE: packages/threading/ copied from Bun source

Following 'Check Bun First' policy:
- Bun is written in Zig (prefer over Rust/C++ ports)
- ThreadPool.zig (~1,000 lines) - proven implementation
- Keeps Bun-sourced utilities organized separately

Potential uses:
- Parallel implementation of CPython API functions
- Future async/threading support
- Performance-critical concurrent operations

Good organizational practice! ✅
